name: knowledge-vault
description: The most comprehensive engineering knowledge base ever assembled — from first principles to research-level depth

scripts.docs:build: node scripts/generate-og-png.mjs && node scripts/generate-rss.mjs && node scripts/build-context.mjs && node scripts/build-mcp-index.mjs && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=24576 --max-semi-space-size=1024" vitepress build docs && npx pagefind --site docs/.vitepress/dist
scripts.deploy: npm run docs:build && vercel deploy docs/.vitepress/dist --prod
